provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a post-clarification confirmation turn where the assistant has already mapped the requested items to specific pending orders, making cancellation execution the most direct grounded action.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible state. Scores favor cancel_pending_order because the user has confirmed the exact orders and reason for cancellation.
notes: query is taken verbatim from the visible user turn
history_summary excludes the later tool outputs that show the cancellations succeeding
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
best_action represents the cancellation tool family even though the real episode issued two cancel_pending_order calls in parallel
